app_meta_description: A mobile-first portfolio built with SvelteKit, shadcn-svelte structure, and motion-driven navigation.
app_swipe_hint: Swipe between pages on touch devices
app_projects_navigation_hint: Swipe right to return home on touch devices, or use the visible route controls.
app_profile_headline: Frontend engineer building quiet interfaces with strong motion direction.
app_profile_bio: Hi! I’m Rafael, a frontend engineer currently working at Atendo :3
app_project_atendo_summary: An omnichannel customer support platform designed to centralize communication across channels like WhatsApp, email, and web. Atendo enables teams to manage tickets, automate workflows, and monitor performance through a unified interface, improving efficiency and customer satisfaction while reducing operational costs.
app_project_commin_summary: A mobile-first Progressive Web App social platform for company professionals, inspired by Instagram’s interaction model. Users can publish and draft posts, share videos and images, create events, and run polls. I led the front of the application and the implementation of a gamification system that rewards engagement with points redeemable for vouchers and other incentives.
app_project_commin_crm_summary: A CRM platform built to support and extend the Commin ecosystem. It enables administrators to manage content, monitor user engagement, and configure platform features, providing full control over the social application’s operations.
app_project_loreal_summary: A mobile-first Progressive Web App designed to deliver educational content about L’Oréal brands in an engaging and accessible way. The platform uses an Instagram-style story interface combined with bite-sized content modules to improve knowledge retention. Users can explore brands, understand product labeling, and access information seamlessly, even offline.
